title: A Prognostic.
content:
As many laws and lawyers do express
    Nought but a kingdom's ill-affectedness;
    Even so, those streets and houses do but show
    Store of diseases where physicians flow.
meaning:
"A Prognostic." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
